---
title: "OLS and Elastic Net"
author: "Erica"
date: "2026-03-11"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Preparation
```{r, echo = False}
# load libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(glmnet)
library(caret)
library(lubridate)
# load data
df <- read_csv('data/final_data.csv')
```

## wrap modeling process in a function
```{r}
predict_alpha <- function(df){
  # preprocessing
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      caldt = as.Date(caldt),
      year = year(caldt)
    ) %>%
    arrange(year, crsp_fundno) %>%
    drop_na()

  # define features
  feature_names <- df %>%
    select(-alpha_ann, -crsp_fundno, -caldt, -year) %>%
    colnames()

  # storage
  results_ols <- list()
  results_enet <- list()


  # initialise training window
  years <- sort(unique(df$year))
  start_year <- min(years)
  initial_train_end <- 2019
  if(!(2019 %in% years)){
    stop("Dataset must contain year 2019 for initial training window.")
  }

  # expanding window loop

  for (t in (initial_train_end + 1) : max(years)) {

    train_full <- df %>%
      filter(year >= start_year & year <= (t - 1))
    
    test_data <- df %>%
      filter(year == t)

    if (nrow(test_data) == 0) next

    # hyperparameter tuning: 70/30 ratio; no data leakage
    tune_years <- sort(unique(train_full$year))
    
    split_index <- floor(0.7 * length(tune_years))
    
    train_years <- tune_years[1 : split_index]
    valid_years <- tune_years[(split_index + 1) : length(tune_years)]
   
    train_tune <- train_full %>% 
      filter(year %in% train_years)
    valid_tune <- train_full %>%
      filter(year %in% valid_years)
    
    X_train <- train_tune %>% 
      select(all_of(feature_names)) %>%
      as.matrix()
    y_train <- train_tune$alpha_ann
    
    X_valid <- valid_tune %>%
      select(all_of(feature_names)) %>%
      as.matrix()
    y_valid <- valid_tune$alpha_ann
    
    # benchmark: ols
    ols_model <- lm(
      alpha_ann ~ . - crsp_fundno - caldt - year,
      data = train_full
    )
    pred_ols <- predict(ols_model, newdata = test_data)
    
    # store ols forecast
    temp_ols <- test_data %>%
      transmute(
        evaluation_year = year,
        crsp_fundno = crsp_fundno,
        predicted_alpha = as.numeric(pred_ols)
    )

    results_ols[[as.character(t)]] <- temp_ols

    
    # elastic net hyperparameter tuning
    alphas <- seq(0 , 1,by = 0.1)
    best_mse <- Inf
    best_alpha <- NULL
    best_lambda <- NULL

    for (a in alphas){
      model <- glmnet(
        X_train,
        y_train,
        alpha = a
      )

      lambdas <- model$lambda

      for (l in lambdas){

        preds <- predict(model, newx = X_valid, s = l)
        mse <- mean((y_valid - preds)^2)
        if (mse < best_mse){
          best_mse <- mse
          best_alpha <- a
          best_lambda <- l
        }
      }
    }

    # refit tuned elastic net on full window
    X_full <- train_full %>%
      select(all_of(feature_names)) %>%
      as.matrix()
    
    y_full <- train_full$alpha_ann
    
    enet_model <- glmnet(
      X_full,
      y_full,
      alpha = best_alpha,
      lambda = best_lambda
    )

    X_test <- test_data %>%
      select(all_of(feature_names)) %>%
      as.matrix()

    pred_enet <- predict(enet_model, newx = X_test)
    
    # store predictions
    
    temp_enet <- test_data %>%
      transmute(
        evaluation_year = year,
        crsp_fundno = crsp_fundno,
        predicted_alpha = as.numeric(pred_enet)
      )

    results_enet[[as.character(t)]] <- temp_enet


  }

  # combine predictions
  ols_df <- bind_rows(results_ols)
  enet_df <- bind_rows(results_enet)
  return(list(
    ols_predictions = ols_df,
    enet_predictions = enet_df
    )
  )
}
```

## produce forecast
```{r}
result <- predict_alpha(df)
ols_df  <- result$ols_predictions
enet_df <- result$enet_predictions
```

## view results
```{r}
View(ols_df)
View(enet_df)
```
